✦ Event IntelligenceLast generated: 5h ago
IDA Playbook: Unlocking the $11M Dutchess Package Before the Political Window Closes
Roundtable12 people·Within 3 weeks
▼
⚡ Why now: The June 29 Soho House EIA meeting just produced a completed economic impact analysis using NPLAN software — the exact deliverable needed to make a Dutchess IDA case. Simultaneously, the June 26 HVEDC team notes flag that the current town supervisor has 'historically opposed PILOT agreements' with a '70% estimated non-support risk for applications filed within the next three months,' creating a narrow window to act. The DCIDA partner contact was last touched 15 days ago and is warm.
Agritourism at Scale: A Farm-to-Investment Dinner at Klocke Estate
Member Dinner14 people·This summer, late July
▼
⚡ Why now: The June 25 Blue Chip Farms introduction surfaced an immediate need for 'construction suppliers and local contractors' and 'development, construction, and operational network' introductions for a 700-acre resort. Simultaneously, the June 29 HVEDC team call flagged an active search for 'high-end boutique grocer options' — Klocke Estate's farm-to-glass model and Rodale Institute's regenerative agriculture expertise make this gathering the natural place to answer that question. Klocke is also in an active Series A3 capital raise ($6.1M 2026 revenue projected) and needs the investor exposure this room provides.
Missing Middle Under the Microscope: A Working Session on the Hudson Valley Housing Pipeline
Roundtable10 people·Within 2 weeks — before the July 15 UCIDA agenda deadline passes
▼
⚡ Why now: The June 30 UCIDA/Frog Alley meeting set a hard July 6-7 application deadline. The June 26 Rieger Homes meeting surfaced rising costs from 'new regulations and environmental requirements, particularly the impact of restrictive material usage in trench excavation.' Mountco Construction (ID:165) has been flagged in the network notes as the exact subcontractor relationships Lantern and Backyard need — but that introduction has not yet been made. miniMAX weebuild (ID:6) has never been invited to any event despite being the modular construction solution to the cost problem Rieger described.
Power, Land & Capital: A Closed-Door Briefing on the Hudson Valley Data Center Opportunity
Member Dinner10 people·Within 3 weeks
▼
⚡ Why now: The June 26 HVEDC team call explicitly flagged: 'uncertain status of a data center deal, where power rights have been secured, but delays in real estate closing leave the project's viability in question' with an action item to 'initiate conversation with Lynn to discuss overall transaction status, explore interest in alternative buyers or strategic alliances.' Jay Kim (Adeline Capital) was in that call and is the deal's capital intelligence source. Arcadian Cap Group's Middletown warehouse already has 13MW power infrastructure — a direct alternative site if the current deal collapses.
